decision.reason: Snowflake SQL can implement MERGE-based history patterns, but ContractForge has not certified Databricks/Snowflake parity for late-arriving changes, delete predicates, replay idempotency, validity-window closure and concurrent history updates.
decision.planner_behavior: Keep Snowflake planning at REVIEW_REQUIRED for historical and snapshot_reconcile_soft_delete. Do not silently fall back to append, overwrite or current-state merge.

required_before_promotion: Databricks/Snowflake parity contracts for historical initial load, changed-row wave, no-change replay and late-arriving updates.
Delete-expression parity for historical and snapshot soft-delete tombstones.
Snowflake query ids and control-table evidence for expired/current row counts, validity windows and idempotent reruns.
Failure evidence for duplicate keys, null keys, overlapping validity windows and stale sequence policy.
Query-history cost evidence for representative production-sized history workloads.
acceptance: Stable-final Snowflake claims exclude historical and snapshot soft-delete until linked E2E parity evidence exists.
